_note: Canned deterministic A/B QUIESCENT control tape — NO guard trigger. The guarded arm is genuinely LIVE (guard on, FV fresh on every tick, basis warmed) but the FV AGREES with the venue mid throughout (fv 0.55, mid 0.50, gap 0.05 == basis), so the residual is exactly 0.0 on the row-H tick and the guard falls through to the SAME two-sided quote the FV-blind arm produces. Every decision's SUBSTANCE (kind + reason codes + priced legs) is therefore IDENTICAL across arm A and arm B: the guard, when it does not fire, changes NOTHING. (The arms still carry distinct config_hash / decision_id identity stamps — guard_enabled differs — so this control is over decision substance, never the identity stamp.) Requires overrides ref_min_samples=2, basis_min_samples=2.
